title: First Species Below a Cantus
objective: Complete a strict first-species lower counterpoint under the given upper cantus.
prompt: Replace rests in V1 with one note per beat. Keep V0 unchanged. Stay below the cantus, avoid voice crossing, and create consonant vertical sonorities with no evaluator errors.
success_criteria: Every row remains strict parser-valid MidGrid.
V1 stays below V0 without voice crossing.
No evaluator error issues remain in the corrected solution.
